description:
The RenderMaterialOverride Component allows for overriding materials on a renderer when it is rendered in certain contexts.

Note: This only overrides materials properly if all ``Context``s are used, with a component for each one. This may be a bug.

fields.Context: The context in which to override the materials of ``Renderer`` with the list of ``Overrides``.
fields.Renderer: The renderer to override materials for.
fields.Overrides: A list of materials to override during rendering in a ``Context`` context.

usage: Used to hide materials or change them in a mirror. like showing an evil version of yourself in a mirror, or to hide your head material from your own viewpoint
